---
ID: US-OLV-086
Title: Run HR modal step flows
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-19
Milestone: Build HR workflows and harden QA

As a HR operator
I want guided modal flows for candidate, employee, and device operations
So that multi-step changes are less error-prone

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] StepFlowRunner renders the active flow and current step.
- [ ] Back moves to the previous step when available.
- [ ] Escape closes only when no submit is busy.
- [ ] Submit errors are caught and shown rather than double-submitting.

Notes: Separate from OliverDock conversational flows.
